---
title: "My First Post"
description: "This is a test post using Astro and MDX!"
pubDate: "2026-04-04"
---
import { Image, Picture, Background } from 'astro-lqip/components'
import volcanoImage from '@/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470872.jpg'
import volcanoSunsetImage from '@/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg'

# Hello World!

This is a test post using Astro and MDX!

Background component ImageMetadata import
<Background src={volcanoSunsetImage}>
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component relative path import
<Background src="../images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg">
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component absolute path import
<Background src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg">
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component alias path import
<Background src="@/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg">
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component with remote image
<Background src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/994605/pexels-photo-994605.jpeg">
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component with custom CSS variable
<Background src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg" cssVariable="--custom-background">
  <section class="custom-background">
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component in AVIF format
<Background src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg" format="avif">
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component with lqip color
<Background src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg" lqip="color">
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component in multiple formats
<Background src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg" format={['avif', 'webp', 'jpeg']}>
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component with custom width and height
<Background src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg" width={720} height={720}>
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Background component with several props
<Background src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470482.jpg" format="avif" width={720} height={720} widths={[100, 1200, 1536]} quality={80} fit="cover">
  <section>
    <p>Optimized background</p>
  </section>
</Background>

Image and Picture components ImageMetadata import
<Image width={450} src={volcanoImage} alt="A beautiful volcano" />
<Picture width={450} src={volcanoImage} alt="A beautiful volcano in the sunset" />

Image and Picture components relative path import
<Image width={450} src="../images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470872.jpg" alt="A beautiful volcano" />
<Picture width={450} src="../images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470872.jpg" alt="A beautiful volcano in the sunset" />

Image and Picture components absolute path import
<Image width={450} src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470872.jpg" alt="A beautiful volcano" />
<Picture width={450} src="/src/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470872.jpg" alt="A beautiful volcano in the sunset" />

Image and Picture components import with alias
<Image width={450} src="@/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470872.jpg" alt="A beautiful volcano" />
<Picture width={450} src="@/images/pexels-fabianwiktor-3470872.jpg" alt="A beautiful volcano in the sunset" />

Image and Picture components with remote images
<Image width={450} height={450} src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/994605/pexels-photo-994605.jpeg" alt="A beautiful volcano" />
<Picture width={450} height={450} src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/994605/pexels-photo-994605.jpeg" alt="A beautiful volcano in the sunset" />
